title: Spirits of the Dead
director: Federico Fellini, Louis Malle, Roger Vadim
writer: Edgar Allan Poe, Roger Vadim, Pascal Cousin
actors: Jane Fonda, Brigitte Bardot, Alain Delon
plot: A trio of Edgar Allan Poe adaptations about a cruel countess haunted by her cousin's stallion, a sadistic soldier haunted by his doppelgänger, and an alcoholic actor haunted by the Devil.
